modal.title: Continue Previous Analysis
modal.description: An unfinished analysis from your last session was found. How would you like to proceed?
modal.confirmReset: Are you sure you want to restart? All progress will be lost.

review.title: Saved Responses
review.description: {count} question(s) were answered in the previous session.

summary.title: Step 1 Successfully Completed
summary.description: The following information was collected and saved:

question1_1.title: What is the current project status?
question1_1.description: Please select one of the options below to determine the analysis path.

options.title: Design or modification of a part/device
Troubleshooting a device that has failed on the production line
options.desc: Device has failed in production → Troubleshooting section

options.title: Monitoring and inspection of a healthy device

question1_2_1.title: Which part(s) will the component have working contact with?
question1_2_1.description: The contact type determines potential wear and failure mechanisms.

options.title: Wire Rope or Chain with Pulley or Sprocket

question1_2_1a.title: Specify contact details for "Other" component
question1_2_1a.description: The following information is essential for accurate wear mechanism diagnosis.

question1_2_1b.title: Enter Process Numeric Parameters
question1_2_1b.description: For {contactType}, the following parameters are required.

question1_2_2.title: Confirm relative motion type between components
question1_2_2.autoDetect: Based on the selected component, motion type "{motionType}" was detected. Please confirm or modify.

question1_2_3.title: Is this a completely new design or based on a previous design?

options.title: Completely new
options.desc: Analysis will be performed with conservative approach

question1_2_4.title: What was the failure history of the previous design?
question1_2_4.description: Selecting the previous failure type helps with more accurate mechanism diagnosis.

options.title: Wear or failure due to contamination
Wire Rope or Chain with Pulley

question1_3_2a.title: Could this failure lead to a safety incident?
question1_3_2a.description: Fall, part ejection, explosion, or any incident threatening personnel safety.

options.title: I don't know / Needs further investigation
options.desc: Analysis will be performed with conservative approach

question1_3_2b.title: How do you rate the urgency level of this failure?

options.title: Critical
options.desc: Immediate life threat or risk of collapse/explosion

options.title: Standard
options.desc: No impact on production or safety

messages.critical: ⚠️ CRITICAL SAFETY WARNING: This failure could lead to injury or death.
messages.urgent: ⚠️ PRODUCTION STOP WARNING: This failure has caused complete production line shutdown.
messages.high: ⚡ PRODUCTION REDUCTION WARNING: This failure has affected production capacity.
messages.standard: ℹ️ STANDARD ANALYSIS: This failure has no impact on production or safety.
messages.unknown: ⚠️ UNCERTAINTY: Conservative approach - Analysis performed with highest sensitivity level.

question1_3_3.title: What impact has this failure had on production?

question1_3_4.title: Is this the first occurrence of this failure?

options.title: No, similar failure has occurred before (Recurrent)

question1_3_5.title: What was the outcome of the previous solution?

options.title: Previous solution was successful, but failure has recurred
Previous solution was never effective and problem persisted
Previous solution was not documented or information unavailable

question1_4_1.title: What does the latest oil analysis report show?

options.title: Increase in silica particles or external contamination

question1_4_1.notAvailableWarning:
Oil analysis report is not available. Analysis continues without this data:

· Shorter lubricant replacement intervals will be recommended.
· Accuracy of wear mechanism diagnosis may be reduced.
· It is recommended to start a periodic oil analysis program.

question1_4_2.title: What does the latest vibration monitoring report show?
question1_4_2.description: Vibration status can indicate developing mechanical problems.

options.title: Increased amplitude at main frequencies
options.desc: Intensified vibration at normal operating frequencies

options.title: Appearance of new and abnormal frequencies
options.desc: Frequencies that did not previously exist

question1_4_2.notAvailableWarning: ⚠️ Vibration report is not available. Analysis continues without this data.

question1_4_3.title: Have there been any recent changes in equipment operating conditions?

options.title: Working load change
options.desc: Increase or decrease in applied load

options.title: Working speed change
options.desc: Increase or decrease in operating speed

options.title: Ambient temperature change
options.desc: Increase or decrease in work environment temperature

options.title: Humidity or dust change
options.desc: Increase or decrease in environmental contamination

options.title: Repairs or replacement of other parts
Change in supplier or quality of spare parts
Change in lubricant type or brand

question1_4_3.validationWarning: Please specify the direction (increase or decrease) for the selected options.
question1_4_3.noChangeMessage: Continue monitoring program as per routine.

question2_1.title: What is the first part (moving or primary)?
question2_1.description: Which part is in working contact with other parts?
question2_1.auto_message: Based on Step 1 responses, first part: {part}

question2_2.title: What is the second part (stationary or mating)?
question2_2.description: Specify the second part in contact with the first part.
question2_2.auto_message: Based on first part, second part: {part}
question2_2.opt17_desc: Contact with wire rope or chain

question2_2a.title: Specify details for "Other" second part
question2_2a.description: Enter the following specifications for the other second part.

question2_3.title: Enter Mechanical and Thermal Properties
question2_3.description: Please enter the mechanical and thermal properties for both parts. All 20 values must be completed.

question2_5.title: What is the contact geometry type between the two parts?
question2_5.detected_as: Based on the parts, contact geometry "{geometry}" was detected.
question2_5.confirm_message: Please confirm or modify if needed.

question2_5a.title: Enter Contact Geometry Numeric Parameters
question2_5a.description: For other geometry, enter the following 7 parameters.

question2_6.title: Enter Contact Numeric Parameters
question2_6.description: Enter 13 parameters for roughness, load, speed, and temperature.

question2_8.title: Which family does the dominant surface damage pattern belong to?
question2_8.description: First select the damage family, then the exact pattern.
question2_8.pattern_description: Based on the selected family, specify the exact pattern.

question2_8b.title: Dominant Wear Mechanism
question2_8b.mechanism_is: Based on the damage pattern, the dominant wear mechanism "{mechanism}" was detected.
question2_8b.confirm_no: No, I'll select the correct mechanism
question2_8b.confirm_additional: Yes, but additional mechanisms are involved

question2_9.title: What is the relative motion type between the failed and mating parts?

question2_13.title: What type of contaminants are present in the environment?
question2_13.description: Multiple options can be selected. Option 1 is incompatible with others.

question2_13a.title: Wear Synergism by Particles
question2_13a.warning_text: According to literature, the combination of corrosion and abrasive wear can create a synergistic effect.
question2_13a.question: Are the following signs observed?
question2_13a.opt1: Iron oxide particles (brown-red) with metallic particles in oil
question2_13a.opt2: Wear occurring much faster than expected

question2_13b.title: Supplementary Parameters
question2_13b.description: The following parameters are requested based on specific conditions.

question2_13e.title: Number of Working Cycles
question2_13e.description: Enter the expected number of cycles.

question2_13h.title: Shaft Vibrating Mass
question2_13h.description: Enter the effective vibrating mass of the shaft.

question2_14.title: Has any coating or surface treatment been applied to {part}?
question2_14.description: Specify the coating or surface treatment on the first part.

question2_15.title: Has any coating or surface treatment been applied to {part}?
question2_15.description: Specify the coating or surface treatment on the second part.

question2_16.title: Has the metallurgical microstructure of the parts been examined?

question2_16a.title: What type of microstructural defect was found?
question2_16a.description: Select the type of defect observed in the microstructure.

question2_geometry.title: Enter Precise Contact Geometry Parameters
question2_geometry.description: Based on the part type, enter the required geometric parameters.
question2_geometry.note_journal: D_shaft: Shaft diameter | D_bush: Bush diameter | L: Bearing length | c: Clearance | α: Angle

question3_1.title: Special Conditions for Lubrication System
question3_1.description: The following special conditions can affect the selection of the lubrication system. The main logic (speed, load, temperature, contact stress) will still be considered in the final decision.
question3_1.info_text: Option 6 ("None of the above") is incompatible with other options. Options 1 to 5 can be selected simultaneously.
question3_1.none_of_above: None of the above (analysis based on main logic)

1.title: High Fire Risk
1.desc: Remove mineral oil and hydrocarbons. Priority with emulsion or solid lubricant

2.title: Very High Precision (µm)
2.desc: Remove hydrodynamic (vibration) and grease (noise). Priority with aerostatic

3.title: Frequent Start-Stop
3.desc: Remove pure hydrodynamic and EHL. Priority with hybrid or hydrostatic

4.title: Vacuum or Corrosive Environment
4.desc: Remove all oils and grease. Only solid lubricant

5.title: Low Maintenance (Maintenance-free)
5.desc: Priority with grease or solid lubricant

6.title: None of the above
6.desc: Only main logic (speed, load, temperature, p_max)

1.name: Hydrodynamic
1.desc: Full fluid film with self-generated pressure

question3_4.title: Does the current lubrication system have any issues?

question3_5.title: Where is the main problem located?

question3_9.title: Are filters healthy and bypass closed?

question3_11.title: Is the fluid foaming or aerated?

question4_1.description: Based on the analyzed operating conditions, the base lubricant type has been automatically suggested.

question4_7.ok: Based on analysis results, experimental measurement is not necessary
